raw_consumer_statement:
RE : Formal Complaint Against Citibank , N.A . for Failure to Comply with Georgia Fair Business Practices Act ( O.C.G.A. 10-1-393 ( b ) ( 2 ), ( 5 ), ( 7 ) ) and Improper Closure of Billing Dispute To Whom It May Concern, I have been a Citibank , N.A . credit card holder in good standing for more than XXXX years. I am writing to file a formal complaint against Citibank , N.A . ( " Citi '' ), located at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, regarding their failure to adequately investigate and resolve a billing dispute involving deceptive practices related to the misrepresentation of digital goods and services. XXXX handling of this matter constitutes a violation of Georgias Fair Business Practices Act ( O.C.G.A. 10-1-393 ( b ) ( 2 ), ( 5 ), ( 7 ) ) as well as federal consumer protection standards under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ), 15 U.S.C. 1666. 

Citibank , N.A . is trying to bully me into paying for services and digital products delivered that did not align with the Scope of Work described in Invoice XXXX for {$400.00}. They allow their Staff and Supervisors to yell at customers, hang up on them, be disrespectful, infer that we are liars, and call it Citibank , N.A . Best Practices. Their Billing Dispute Resolution Practices constitute unfair schemes and violate the Truth in Lending Act ( TILA ), as implemented by Regulation Z.
